passiveAbilities.name: Buckler
passiveAbilities.description: Enemy characters cannot count Critical Hits against this character.

passiveAbilities.name: Javelin
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Spiteful
passiveAbilities.description: When this model causes 1 or more Wds to an enemy, it restores 1 Wd.

passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy

activeAbilities.name: Rage
activeAbilities.description: Target Faerie loses Weakling until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Throw Javelin
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Piercing Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 1 Wd.
